traits.name: Rage
traits.description: Bonus-action rage: bonus damage on STR attacks, advantage on STR checks/saves, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing; lasts up to 10 minutes while you keep attacking or extend it.

traits.name: Unarmored Defense
traits.description: Without armor, AC = 10 + DEX mod + CON mod (a shield still applies).

traits.name: Weapon Mastery
traits.description: Use the mastery properties of two kinds of weapons of your choice; change one kind on a long rest.

traits.name: Frenzy
traits.description: While raging with Reckless Attack, your first hit each turn deals extra damage equal to your Rage Damage bonus in d6s.
